title: Line slope y=2x+1
content: For a line y = mx + b, the slope is m. In y=2x+1, m=2.

title: Parabola vertex y=(x-1)^2
content: The graph y=(x-1)^2 has its vertex at (1,0).

title: Bar chart maximum category
content: The bars A, B, C have values 3, 5, and 8. Category C is maximum.

title: Line chart increasing trend
content: The plotted values rise from left to right, so the trend is overall increasing.

title: Triangle angle sum
content: Angles in a triangle sum to 180 degrees, so 180-50-60=70.

title: Circle area with radius 3
content: Circle area is pi*r^2. With radius 3, the area is 9*pi.

title: Derivative of x squared
content: Using the power rule, d/dx x^2 = 2x.

title: Coordinate point reading
content: The marked point is located at x=3 and y=2, so its coordinate is (3,2).

title: Histogram total count
content: The three bar values are 4, 6, and 8. Their sum is 18.

title: Rectangle area
content: A rectangle with length 6 and width 4 has area 6*4=24.

title: Fraction simplification
content: The fraction 6/8 can be simplified by dividing numerator and denominator by 2 to get 3/4.

title: Scatter plot correlation
content: The points move upward as x increases, indicating positive correlation.

title: Sine curve period
content: The standard sine function sin(x) has period 2*pi.

title: Pie chart largest share
content: The largest pie slice is Blue and it covers 50 percent.
